notes: Extended SongMeasure with an optional analysis field and rendered inline Korean harmonic notes inside Goodbye measure cells.
Raised the smallest songs-surface text styles used by meta labels, chip labels, inline analysis notes, and the grouped-chord divider to a 12px minimum.
Kept existing songs backward-compatible and left the two-pane songs workspace unchanged.
open_issues: The songs viewer still contains some English UI labels unrelated to the minimum-size fix.
Only Goodbye currently uses the inline analysis-note field.
